body_transformation: The bulbous body now glows with soft pastel pink and ivory white, its surface smooth like polished porcelain with subtle lavender highlights. The skull and crossbones symbol on the chest transforms into a delicate star-shaped emblem made of crystalline starlight silver, shimmering with petal gold accents. Clouds surrounding the head reshape into translucent, petal-like wisps with crystalline veins, gently drifting like fairy dust. The curled tail tip retains its form but becomes covered in soft, velvety petals that emit a gentle starlight glow.
signature_feature: Chest emblem: crystalline starlight silver with petal gold accents and subtle shimmer.
